name: indeed-stealth
description: Indeed blocks basic scrapers with a Security Check 403. With FIRECRAWL_API_KEY set, job.ts routes Indeed URLs straight to Firecrawl with proxy:stealth and bypasses the wall.

data.markdown:
# Senior DevOps Engineer

**ScaleFinance** — Fargo, ND (Remote)

$150,000 - $180,000 a year

## About the role

ScaleFinance is seeking a Senior DevOps Engineer to own our cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines. You will design, build, and operate the platforms that power our financial APIs serving millions of transactions daily.

## Responsibilities

- Design and operate AWS infrastructure using Terraform
- Build GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines for 30+ microservices
- Monitor production systems with Datadog and respond to incidents
- Partner with security on SOC2 / PCI compliance
- Mentor junior platform engineers

## Requirements

- 5+ years in SRE / DevOps / platform engineering
- Deep AWS and Terraform experience
- Strong Python or Go
- Linux internals and networking fundamentals
- Experience with observability stacks (Datadog, Grafana, Prometheus)

metadata.title: Senior DevOps Engineer - ScaleFinance - Fargo, ND | Indeed.com
